items.title: [Scotto] The Kings are expected to waive DeMar DeRozan if they cannot find a trade partner with the Clippers being the frontrunner to sign him.
items.author: urfaselol
items.body_excerpt: “In the midst of a rebuild and over the first apron, barring an unexpected trade, the Sacramento Kings are expected to waive-and-stretch forward DeMar DeRozan, HoopsHype has learned. DeRozan’s $25.74 million expiring contract is only guaranteed for $10 million, which can be…

items.title: DeMar DeRozan joins The Richard Show
items.author: Richard A. Jefferson
items.body_excerpt: For some reason you guys keep asking for longer episodes so... today we’ve got our longest one to date with DeMar DeRozan (mainly because it took him a solid 5 minutes to name his three favorite artists). Nothing was off limits in this one... from his upbringing in South Central…
